title: Clinical Research Associate
description: Genentech is seeking a Clinical Research Associate to support clinical trials in our Raleigh facility. You'll work hybrid coordinating research studies that advance breakthrough cancer and genetic disease treatments. Help bring life-changing medicines to patients.
responsibilities: Coordinate clinical trial activities including patient enrollment and scheduling
Assist with informed consent process and document collection
Monitor patient safety and report adverse events
Maintain regulatory documentation and trial records
Communicate with research team and study sites
Ensure compliance with study protocols and regulatory requirements

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Life Sciences, Healthcare, or related field
skills: Knowledge of clinical research and GCP guidelines
Proficiency with electronic case report forms (eCRF)
Understanding of medical terminology and safety reporting
certifications: GCP certification required or within 30 days of hire
